data.content: 1. Beat-detail-specific behavior is covered and src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts passes, but approval is blocked because the implementation review requires green sanity gates. 2. The current branch modifies src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts and src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts, and the full suite still fails at src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts:551: the hierarchical dotted alias parent inference returns undefined instead of 8792. 3. Verified gates in this review: bun run test failed on that assertion; bunx tsc --noEmit succeeded; bun run build succeeded. Return this beat to implementation until the backend regression is fixed and the full suite is green.
